name: Utility Functions
description: Common utility functions for validation, formatting, and rate limiting

intent.what: Provides helper functions for input validation, data formatting, and rate limiting
intent.why: Reduces boilerplate and provides standardized utilities that work seamlessly with the SDK

functions.name: isValidEmail
functions.description: Validates if a string is a valid email format

functions.name: validatePassword
functions.description: Validates password strength with detailed feedback

functions.name: validateFileType
functions.description: Validates if a file's MIME type is in the allowed list

functions.name: validateFileSize
functions.description: Validates if a file is within the size limit

functions.name: formatFileSize
functions.description: Formats file sizes in human-readable format

functions.name: RateLimiter
functions.description: Rate limiter for controlling request rates

usage.input_validation: Use isValidEmail, validatePassword for user input
usage.rate_limiting: Use RateLimiter class or rateLimit function

integration.validators: Work with ValidationError and Zod schemas
integration.formatters: Work with data from database queries
integration.rate_limiting: Can protect routes using enforceAuth middleware
